questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Expand (3x − 2)⁴ in descending powers of x and simplify your answer.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: An arithmetic sequence has u₁ = 36, u₂ = 29, u₃ = 22. Find the common difference d.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: For the sequence in part (a), find u₈.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: For the sequence in part (a), find S₈.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Consider a geometric sequence with a₁ = 9 and a₄ = 1. Find the common ratio r.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: A discrete random variable X has the probability distribution shown in the accompanying table. Find the value of the constant m.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Maya invests $9 000 in an account that pays an annual interest rate of 5.2 %, compounded annually. Write a formula that gives the value of the investment after n years.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Using your formula, calculate the amount of money in the account after (i) 1 year; (ii) 3 years.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Maya hopes to use the investment as part of a $11 000 deposit on a flat. Determine whether she can achieve this within 5 years.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText:
Only one of the four sequences below is arithmetic and only one is geometric:

aₙ = ¼, ⅕, ⅙, ⅐, …
bₙ = 3, 6, 9, 12, …
cₙ = 4, 2, 1, ½, …
dₙ = 1, 4, 9, 16, …

State which sequence is arithmetic and give its common difference.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: State which sequence is geometric and give its common ratio.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: For the geometric sequence identified in part (b), find the exact value of the sixth term.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Consider the expansion of (x + 4)⁸. Write down the number of terms in the expansion.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the coefficient of the term in x⁵ in the expansion of (x + 4)⁸.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the value of log₅ 125, giving your answer as an integer.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Evaluate log₅ 45 + log₅ 3.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Calculate log₅ 8 − log₅ 80.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Prove that the sum of four consecutive odd integers is divisible by 4.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText:
Only one of the following four sequences is arithmetic and only one is geometric:

aₙ = 2, 6, 10, 14, …
bₙ = ½, ⅔, ¾, ⅚, …
cₙ = 1.2, 2.4, 3.6, 4.8, …
dₙ = 3, 1, ⅓, ⅑, …

State which sequence is arithmetic and give its common difference.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: State which sequence is geometric and give its common ratio.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: For the geometric sequence identified in part (b), find the exact value of the eighth term. Give your answer as a fraction.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: A geometric series has common ratio 4x. State the domain of x for which the sum to infinity exists.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: The sum to infinity of the series is 72 and the first term is 60. Find x.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the value of log₇ 7.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Evaluate log₇ 49 + log₇ 2.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Calculate log₇ 98 − log₇ 2.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Let k and k + 1 be consecutive positive integers. Show that the difference of their squares equals the sum k + (k + 1).

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Consider the arithmetic sequence 5, 9, 13, 17, … . Find the common difference d.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the 10th term of the sequence.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the sum of the first 10 terms of the sequence.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: In a geometric sequence, the fifth term u₅ is 162 and the sixth term u₆ is 202.5. Find the common ratio r.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find u₁, the first term of the sequence.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Calculate the sum of the first 12 terms of the sequence.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Write down the number of terms in the expansion of (3x − 1)⁹.

questions.subject: mathematics
questions.questionText: Find the coefficient of the term in x² in the expansion of (3x − 1)⁹.
